mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review SET regDate = NOW(), updateDate = NOW(), memberId = #{memberId}, concertId = #{concertId}, title = #{title}, `body` = #{body}, rating = #{rating}, `type` = #{type}, orderId = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, M.nickname AS extra__writer FROM review AS R INNER JOIN `member` AS M ON R.memberId = M.id WHERE R.concertId = #{concertId} AND R.`type` = #{type} ORDER BY R.id DESC
SELECT R.*, M.nickname AS extra__writer, C.title AS extra__concertTitle FROM review AS R INNER JOIN `member` AS M ON R.memberId = M.id INNER JOIN concert AS C ON R.concertId = C.id WHERE R.id = #{id}
SELECT A.*, M.nickname AS extra__writer FROM Review AS A INNER JOIN `member` AS M ON A.memberId = M.id ORDER BY A.id DESC
